description: Argentine shipping carriers (Andreani, OCA, Correo Argentino) as drop-in tools for Vercel AI SDK 6+ agents.

tools.name: cotizar_envio
tools.summary: Quote an envío via a specific carrier

tools.name: cotizar_envio_todos
tools.summary: Quote in parallel across all configured carriers (cheapest first)
tools.output: { quotes: QuoteOption[], cheapest: QuoteOption, errors: { carrier, error }[] }

tools.name: crear_envio
tools.summary: Create a real shipment, get trackingNumber + label URL
sideEffects: Registers shipment with carrier — IRREVERSIBLE except via cancelar_envio (when supported)

tools.name: trackear_envio
tools.summary: Get current status + event history for a trackingNumber

tools.name: cancelar_envio
tools.summary: Cancel a non-delivered shipment (when carrier supports)

tools.name: listar_sucursales
tools.summary: List drop-off / pickup branches near a CPA
